## Authoring commitment

- [ ] I plan to author the initial scaffold (README, fact-sheet, practice-plan, ~5 notes files) myself

## Out-of-scope acknowledgement

- [ ] I will not include verbatim exam questions
- [ ] I will cite official vendor documentation
- [ ] I will follow the existing scaffold structure documented in [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
